name: Airnow
description: Airnow — B2B SaaS platform combining app analytics, ASO tools, competitor insights and mobile user acquisition/monetization across 300,000 active mobile properties.

seo.title: Airnow — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Airnow: Airnow — B2B SaaS platform combining app analytics, ASO tools, competitor insights and mobile user acquisition/monetization across 300,000 active mobile

when_to_use: Tracking ASO keyword rankings and store performance across 300k apps
Competitor benchmarking for app store optimization strategy
Managing paid UA + organic ASO from a unified mobile dashboard
Identifying keyword opportunities using app-store intelligence data

pros: Analytics, ASO, and UA under one B2B SaaS roof
cons: UI feels dated compared to newer platforms
review.verdict: Reasonable all-in-one for mid-size publishers but rarely the best tool in any one category.
review.best_for: Publishers with multiple apps wanting analytics, ASO, and UA consolidated
review.not_for: Indies who just need keyword tracking at a low price
